name: phase01_selection_events
outcome_goal: Clicking a row in DataTable publishes selection to World; KeyValue and other modules react

jobs.label: p1_datatable_publish
p1_keyvalue_subscribe
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Update src/modules/display/KeyValueModule.tsx to subscribe to World selection events:

- Import { useWorldSelection } from '../../hooks/useWorldSelection'
- Add config options:
  - subscribeSelection?: string (objectType to subscribe to)
  - displayProperties?: string[] (which properties to show, or all if not set)
- When subscribeSelection is set:
  - Use useWorldSelection(config.subscribeSelection) to get the selected object
  - If an object is selected, display its properties as key-value pairs
  - Capitalize property names for labels (e.g., 'deal_value' -> 'Deal Value')
  - If displayProperties is set, only show those properties in that order
  - If no object selected, show 'Select an item to view details' message
- Keep existing functionality (static items, endpoint fetch) working
- Style: use existing dark theme variables

Write the updated file.
